name: ALSHAYA.COM
message: [AI generated] Alshaya.com is the digital domain of the multinational retail franchise operator M.H. Alshaya Co. The company, based in Kuwait, operates over 4,000 stores in sectors like fashion & footwear, food, health & beauty, pharmacy, and more across Middle East, North Africa, Russia, Turkey, and Europe. Alshaya manages more than 90 consumer brands like Starbucks, H&M, Mothercare, Debenhams, and Victoria's Secret.
